subHeadline: From the carbureted M100 to the modular OM654, mapped against the models that carried it. The complete Mercedes-Benz engine timeline.

eras.models: W206, W214, GLC X254, AMG GT

keyTakeaway: The OM616/OM617 built Mercedes' "will run forever" diesel reputation — but the OM651's "Black Death" injector story reversed that perception for a generation. The OM654 has largely restored it. The M156/M157/M177 lineage remains AMG's defining V8 story.
